title: Amped Delight
description: Vanilla Minecraft, reimagined. Hundreds of new biomes, 20+ animals, overhauled structures, Farmers Delight, and a few surprises waiting in the End.
body:
# Amped Delight

**Fabric 1.21.1 | Singleplayer & Multiplayer | Shaders Pre-Configured**

You know that feeling when you first loaded into a Minecraft world? The curiosity, the wonder, the *"what's behind that mountain"* energy?

**Amped Delight brings that back.**

This isn't a kitchen-sink pack. Every mod was handpicked to make vanilla Minecraft feel deeper, richer, and more alive -- without losing what makes Minecraft *Minecraft*. No tech trees. No magic systems. No wiki required. Just a world that finally feels as big as it always should have. 

- Check keybinds before playing (and discovered Quality of Life improvements)

![image01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mmGmIfXL/images/3262c480c80825419c60889fd3f7727b7418a234.png)

## A World You Won't Recognize

The overworld has been rebuilt from the ground up. **Terralith**, **Biomes O' Plenty**, and **Wilder Wild** combine to create hundreds of new biomes -- from towering ancient forests to wind-swept highlands, hidden underground caverns, and lush river valleys. Every world seed feels like an adventure waiting to happen.

And the trees? **Oh, The Trees You'll Grow** makes sure every biome has vegetation that actually belongs there. This isn't just new colors on the same old terrain. This is a world that feels *designed*.

![image03](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mmGmIfXL/images/ad11752cfbe851e7c59f8559ac00c49bcce9e2dc.png)
![image08](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mmGmIfXL/images/d8e0da58cc3d8d8c04f82941da104f493c5044e2.png)

## Structures That Tell Stories

Forget the same three-room villages and copy-paste mineshafts.

Villages now generate in smarter, more natural locations. Mineshafts sprawl into massive underground networks. Ruined portals feel weathered and ancient. Underwater ruins actually look like something used to live there.

Then there are the **Grand Capitals** -- enormous, rare settlements that'll make your jaw drop when you stumble into one. Overhauled Woodland Mansions that are actually worth raiding. Ancient Cities that feel genuinely threatening.

**But here's the part we won't spoil:** The Stronghold is not what you remember. The End is not what you remember. The Dragon fight? *Completely* different. If you think you know how that story ends -- you don't. Some things you just have to see for yourself.

![image03](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mmGmIfXL/images/20a6669b32fb5f12b4837d7332ba71ebfe3cdf9d.png)

## A Living, Breathing World

Over **20 new animal species** roam the world. Red pandas in bamboo forests. Snow leopards on frozen peaks. Hippos in rivers. Meerkats in deserts. Owls at night. Harp seals on ice floes. Lions prowling savannas. Gorillas in jungles. Crocodiles in swamps. Even bull sharks if you're unlucky. _Absolutely incredible mods by [@Aquarius.playz](https://modrinth.com/user/Aquarius.playz)_

These aren't reskinned cows. They have real behaviors, real animations, and they make every biome feel like it has its own ecosystem. The world is alive in a way vanilla never quite managed.

Oh, and your Ghast? You can make it happy now. You're welcome.

## Farmers Delight

This one deserves its own section.

**Farmers Delight** transforms Minecraft's food system into something you'll genuinely enjoy engaging with. Cutting boards, cooking pots, new crops, and actual recipes that feel rewarding to discover. Display your creations on shelves and in crates. Harvest crops with a simple right-click. The Biomes O' Plenty integration means new biomes bring new ingredients to the table -- literally.

Your kitchen is about to become the heart of your base.

## The Nether, Evolved

The Nether isn't just a fast-travel tunnel anymore. **Eternal Nether** expands the dimension with new biomes, new structures, and a whole new atmosphere. Amethyst variants add fresh underground variety. The Nether finally feels like a dimension worth exploring on its own terms.

![iamge04](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mmGmIfXL/images/fa84e17b45d54997713e7f5bd1d81510f63b32a0.png)
![image05](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mmGmIfXL/images/1149f661855c44fe4494577f4852715c85a2921c.png)

## Dig Deeper

**Better Archaeology** gives the brush-and-dig system the love it deserved at launch. More excavation sites, more artifacts, more reasons to actually pay attention to suspicious blocks. Grab your brush -- there's history buried everywhere.

## Gorgeous Out of the Box

Amped Delight ships with a full visual preset that works the moment you hit play:

- **6 shader packs** included -- **Complementary Reimagined + Euphoria Patches** as the default
- **12 resource packs** pre-configured -- animated lanterns, glowing ores, reimagined chests, refreshed HUD, better bows, and more
- **Beltborne Lanterns** -- carry light on your hip like the adventurer you are
- **Presence Footsteps** -- hear your steps change on wood, stone, gravel, snow
- **Ambient Sounds** -- birds sing, caves drip, forests hum
- **Dynamic Lights** -- torches light up the world in your hand
- **Subtle Effects** and **Visuality** -- particles and details you didn't know you were missing

Everything is pre-configured but fully customizable. Swap shaders, toggle packs, make it yours. The pack looks incredible out of the box -- but it's *your* box.

![image06](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mmGmIfXL/images/0febff82e9ba58a9a174ef51d2ada2b394d0883e.png)

## Quality of Life, Done Right

- **Xaero's World Map & Minimap** -- finally know where you are
- **JEI** -- look up any recipe instantly
- **Jade** -- hover over anything to learn what it is
- **Shulker Box Tooltips** -- peek inside without placing
- **Inventory Profiles Next** -- auto-sort, auto-replace, auto-refill
- **Nature's Compass** -- find any biome
- **Music Notification** -- know what track is playing
- **Zoomify** -- zoom in like you always wanted to
- **Villager Names** -- they're people now (kind of)
- **Better Advancements** -- a progression screen that actually makes sense
- **Enchantment Descriptions** -- no more guessing what enchantments do


## Built for Multiplayer

Grab your friends. Amped Delight has full multiplayer support:

- **Simple Voice Chat** -- proximity voice chat, built right in
- **Ping Wheel** -- mark locations and points of interest for your team
- **Chat Heads** -- see who's talking
- **Essential** -- invite friends without setting up a dedicated server

This pack was designed to be played together.


## Performance That Respects Your Hardware

Built on **Sodium + Lithium** with aggressive optimization across the board. Entity culling, fast item frames, scalable lighting, chunk loading tweaks -- all working behind the scenes so you get frames, not a slideshow. Even with shaders on, this pack runs smooth.

---

## A Few More Things We Love

- **Weapon Master** -- more combat variety
- **Graves** -- die with dignity, retrieve with ease
- **Teleport Doors** -- link doors across your world
- **More Shield Variants** -- shields that match your style
- **Comforts** -- hammocks and sleeping bags for the road
- **Resource Backpacks** -- carry more, stress less
- **Slabbed** -- slabs for blocks that should have always had them
- **Connectable Chains** -- finally
- **Sooty Chimneys** -- the detail you didn't know you needed

---

## From the Creator

Amped Delight includes two custom-built mods:

- **WikiCraft Spotlight** -- in-game info when you need it
- **LootLedger** -- track your loot and discoveries across your journey

---

## Who Is This For?

You love vanilla Minecraft. You don't want to learn a new game. You just want *your* game to feel like it finally got the update it deserves.

**This is that update. Install and play.**

---

*120+ mods, 12 resource packs, 6 shader options -- all tested, configured, and balanced to work together. No setup required.*

![image07](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mmGmIfXL/images/42c272a20c8a551723e9ac6d1be7566f70319aa1.png)
